CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GIS_Proximity_Check when the project location intersects a FEMA Special Flood Hazard Area (SFHA). Triggers E.O. 11988 floodplain management compliance, CWA 404(b)(1) alternatives analysis requirement, and may trigger CZMA coastal zone review. Source: ESRI-hosted USA Flood Hazard Reduced Set FeatureServer.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Project intersects a FEMA Special Flood Hazard Area. E.O. 11988 floodplain compliance and CWA 404(b)(1) alternatives analysis required.
CustomField.label: FEMA Flood Hazard Flag
